title: Nyla's First Day Friends
synopsis: Nyla feels scared on her first day at preschool, but when she discovers her classmates are friendly animal friends who also felt nervous, she learns that making new friends can turn scary feelings into happy ones.

pages.text: Nyla held Mama's hand tight. Today was her first day at preschool. The big building looked scary. Nyla's tummy felt funny and her eyes got watery. "I don't want to go in," she whispered.

illustration.description: A young Black girl with curly hair in colorful hair ties stands nervously outside a bright yellow preschool building, holding her mother's hand tightly. Nyla wears a purple backpack and red dress, looking worried with wide eyes. Her mother, a tall woman in a blue cardigan, kneels down supportively. The school has cheerful windows and a rainbow sign reading 'Little Learners Preschool' against a sunny blue sky.
illustration.alt: Nyla holding her mother's hand outside preschool, looking nervous

pages.text: Mama gave Nyla a big hug. "It's okay to feel scared," she said softly. "New things can be scary. But look! Do you see the other children playing?" Nyla peeked through the window. She saw kids who looked like animals playing together.

illustration.description: Through a large classroom window, Nyla and her mother observe diverse children playing inside. A boy with fox ears and orange hair builds blocks, a girl with bunny ears and brown skin paints at an easel, and a boy with bear ears plays with toy cars. The classroom is bright with yellow walls, colorful rugs, and educational posters. Nyla's expression shows curiosity mixed with nervousness.
illustration.alt: Nyla and her mother looking through classroom window at children playing

pages.text: "They have animal ears like my costume at home!" Nyla said, feeling a tiny bit less scared. But when Mama had to leave, Nyla felt sad. She sat in the corner by herself, watching the other children play. Her bottom lip trembled.

illustration.description: Nyla sits alone in a cozy reading corner with colorful bean bags and stuffed animals, looking sad with tears in her eyes. In the background, the animal-eared children play happily - building with blocks, reading books, and drawing. The corner has soft lighting and rainbow-colored bookshelves, emphasizing Nyla's isolation despite the cheerful environment.
illustration.alt: Nyla sitting sadly alone in corner while other children play

pages.text: The boy with fox ears walked over to Nyla. "Hi! I'm Felix," he said with a friendly smile. "Are you sad?" Nyla nodded. "I was scared too on my first day," Felix said. "But everyone here is really nice. Want to meet my friends?"

illustration.description: Felix, a cheerful boy with bright orange fox ears and freckles, reaches out his hand to Nyla with a warm smile. He wears a green striped shirt and blue overalls. Nyla looks up hopefully from her bean bag, her expression beginning to soften. The scene shows the transition from sadness to hope with warm lighting and soft, rounded shapes throughout the cozy corner.
illustration.alt: Felix the fox boy introducing himself to sad Nyla

pages.text: Felix brought Nyla to meet Bella Bunny and Bruno Bear. "We were all scared on our first day too!" said Bella. "But now we're brave friends who play together every day." Bruno nodded and offered Nyla a toy dinosaur. "Want to play with us?"

illustration.description: Four children stand together in the center of the bright classroom. Bella, a girl with soft gray bunny ears and dark skin, wears a pink tutu. Bruno, a bigger boy with brown bear ears and round glasses, holds colorful toy dinosaurs. Felix stands with his arm around Nyla's shoulder as she begins to smile. The classroom background shows artwork on walls and toys scattered around.
illustration.alt: The three animal friends welcoming Nyla to their group

pages.text: Nyla felt happy bubbles in her tummy! She wasn't scared anymore. She felt brave like her new friends. They played dinosaurs and built a big castle together. When Mama came back, Nyla was laughing and didn't want to leave. "I love my new friends!" she said with a big, happy smile.

illustration.description: All four children play joyfully together on a colorful play mat, building an elaborate block castle surrounded by toy dinosaurs. Nyla is laughing with pure happiness, her arms raised in celebration. The other children beam with joy around her. Through the window, Nyla's mother can be seen smiling as she watches. The scene is filled with warm golden light and vibrant primary colors, showing complete happiness and friendship.
illustration.alt: Nyla playing happily with her three new friends, looking joyful

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Nyla feel on her first day of school?
questions.explanation: Nyla felt scared on her first day because new things can be scary!

questions.question: Who was the first friend to talk to Nyla?
questions.explanation: Felix the fox was the first friend who came over to talk to Nyla when she was sitting alone.

questions.question: How did Nyla feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: By the end, Nyla felt happy because she made new friends and had fun playing!

questions.question: What did the friends build together?
questions.explanation: Nyla and her new friends built a big castle with blocks while playing together.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words!
pages.text: Nyla felt _____ on her first day at school. But when she met Felix, Bella, and Bruno, she felt _____ and made new friends!

pages.title: Complete the Story!
pages.text: Felix the _____ was very friendly. He helped Nyla feel _____ like all her new friends at school.
